# Tiptap Vendor Bundle

`tiptap.umd.js` is a self-contained browser bundle generated from:

- `@tiptap/core` 3.27.3
- `@tiptap/starter-kit` 3.27.3
- `@tiptap/extension-link` 3.27.3
- `@tiptap/extension-image` 3.27.3
- `@tiptap/extension-table` 3.27.3

The bundle exposes `window.PageStudioTiptap.create(element)`, which the page editor bridge uses to mount Tiptap directly inside the selected webpage element.
